notes: Batch 11 is a uniformly high-quality, all-cloze set drawn almost entirely from MileDown's Behavioral and Biology MCAT decks (psychology, neuroscience, development, and a few biology/physics items). Cloze {{c1::...}} markup and HTML tags net-balance throughout, all notes are single-cloze (c1) with correct stem/answer correspondence, there is no LaTeX/MathJax and no unrendered template artifacts. The only issues are minor: one cloze whose answer is an image-only deletion (FLAT PEG mnemonic), one broken reference-link href and one stray empty anchor, two missing-space merged words, and one card that ends on a dangling 'whereas'. A few harmless spelling/anchor typos (e.g. 'enviromental', 'intensions', 'YouTub Link') were noted but not individually flagged as they remain readable.
